------clientformboundaryda67d2e99e8e5bec1edefd71db4dc85
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="response_type"

------clientformboundaryda67d2e99e8e5bec1edefd71db4dc85
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="X-Progress-ID"

blahblah
------clientformboundaryda67d2e99e8e5bec1edefd71db4dc85
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file_upload_template"; filename=""
Content-Type: application/octet-stream


------clientformboundaryda67d2e99e8e5bec1edefd71db4dc85
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file_upload_template_description"


------clientformboundaryda67d2e99e8e5bec1edefd71db4dc85
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file_upload_1"; filename="ones_nl_128KiB.txt"
Content-Type: text/plain
